productDisplayName: Indigo Nation Men ID Printed Navy Blue Trousers
description: CompositionNavy Blue full length formal trousers with self stripes, made of 100% cotton, has flat front with two pockets on the sides and a patch pocket inside the right one, two deep pockets at the back, metal zipper and button closure, loops on the waist to secure a belt and reinforced stitch detailing along the crotch area and the hemlineFittingRegularWash careMachine wash coldWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachTumble dry lowWarm ironA famous saying goes - "A man's class is raised by a bar with the trousers he wears". The man of substance always chooses his formal trousers with much care, and indigo nation makes it all the more easier with its classy range of formal trousers. Designed with the choicest of cotton fabric, this trouser makes for a perfect daily office wear. Pair it with classic formal shirts and leather shoes to look every bit like the corporate that you are.Model statisticsThe model wears trousers, length of 41.5"Height-6.1", waist-31"
